channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Strategies for Combating Fraud in Reconciliation 3.0
item.description: A recent health-care fraud case highlights the need for data-driven oversight.

item.title: The Pentagon Needs Its Own Transformation
item.description: A modern defense system is needed, not one rooted in World War II-era thinking.

item.title: Democrats Struggle to Justify Platner Candidacy
item.description: The party seeks to drop their Maine Senate nominee after a new sexual assault allegation.

item.title: How U.S. Climate Advocacy Benefits China
item.description: A coordinated legal and policy network restricts American energy while aiding China.
